Aventon has launched its Memorial Day Sale that is dropping most of its smart e-bikes to their lowest prices, with most of them (even ones not receiving price cuts) also getting up to $206 in FREE gear. One of the most notable returns from the brand’s previous sale is Aventon’s most premium Aventure M Mid-Drive All-Terrain Smart e-bike coming with $128 in free gear back down at $2,699 shipped. Since its release in 2025, we mostly saw discounts to $2,799 until last month’s spring sale when it fell to $2,699 for the first time. Not only are you getting a second chance at this all-time low, but it also comes as the first time free bundled gear has been added on, too, making it the best price and overall deal we have tracked to date. Head below to learn more about this premium ride and browse the full lineup of e-bike deals.

items.title: AMD’s newest and fastest Ryzen 9850X3D gaming desktop processor just hit a new low at $459
items.summary:
We are now tracking a deal at Amazon that drops AMD’s latest Ryzen 7 9850X3D desktop processor down to $459 shipped. This is the newest chip in the brand’s X3D lineup, which hit the scene earlier this year carrying a $499 price tag. While you’re not looking at a massive discount on it right now, it’s still a noteworthy offer since it marks a new all-time low for the chip. It’s rare that we see AMD’s latest-generation processors receive meaningful discounts this soon after launch. The Ryzen 7 9800X3D, for instance, didn’t see its first major price cut until nearly a year after debuting. That makes today’s deal a notable one if you were already considering an upgrade to AMD’s newest gaming-focused CPU platform. Even saving a little here can free up extra room in your budget for smaller PC upgrades like additional case fans, storage, or peripherals such as a new keyboard or mouse. items.title: Make recycling cardboard much easier with Fanttik’s sleek C8 Nano electric scissors, now $50
items.summary:
Fanttik C8 Nano Electric Cardboard Scissors

Buy for $50 (Reg. $60)

Clip the on-page $10 off coupon.

What we love

In my city recycling is hauled away once a month, which can be a bit of a challenge unless we pack everything inside in an organized fashion. This rings especially true when we order something big off of Amazon and have a large box to fit in there. I usually use a utility knife to cut individual pieces that will fit inside nicely, but that’s a pain and why I’m strongly considering one of these for my own home.
